entries.name: AI Agent Instructions Pack
entries.summary: Shared AI governance, prompt-injection defense, and repo instruction defaults for downstream template repositories.
entries.notes: Initial additive pack inventory. Canonical files remain in their current working paths until sync automation is introduced.

entries.name: Azure DevOps Governance Pack
entries.summary: Reusable governance assets for Azure DevOps repositories that need branch, work-item, and PR controls without adopting a full starter template.
entries.notes: Current pack inventory is anchored in templates/commitship-ado-governance until the later ALM governance split is complete.

entries.name: Docs-as-Code Pack
entries.summary: Shared documentation templates, style guidance, and doc-quality guardrails that can be synced into downstream repos.
entries.notes: Migration backlog files remain hub-owned even though the documentation standards pack is now defined.

entries.name: Codex Local Agent Instructions Pack
entries.summary: Copyable AGENTS.md and AGENTS.local.md templates for repositories used with Codex local installations.
entries.notes: Provides a local-first instruction pack shape without replacing the shared AI agent instructions pack.

entries.name: GitHub Governance Pack
entries.summary: Reusable GitHub workflows, issue and PR templates, and repository policy files for teams that want the governance baseline without changing their runtime stack.
entries.notes: Release-specific automation is intentionally owned by the release-management pack.

entries.name: Release Management Pack
entries.summary: Shared release-process docs, notes templates, and release validation helpers for downstream template repositories.
entries.notes: Can be consumed independently by repos that do not need the full governance baseline.

entries.name: Tailwind UI Pack
entries.summary: Candidate styling layer for the Vite families, currently tracked as a pack-first option until the packaging decision is finalized.
entries.notes: Packaging remains intentionally provisional until issue 09 is resolved.

entries.name: Testing Guardrails Pack
entries.summary: Shared test harness, quality gates, and accessibility-first E2E defaults extracted from the current repo.
entries.notes: CI execution remains owned by the GitHub governance pack.

entries.name: Operations Automation Template
entries.summary: Dedicated template for operational automation repositories where rollback guidance, troubleshooting, and stronger governance matter more than app scaffolding.

entries.name: Power Automate Knowledge Site Template
entries.summary: Lightweight site template for explainers, process walkthroughs, and educational content similar to MSApprovalsMastery.

entries.name: Power Platform ALM Governance Template
entries.summary: Dedicated Power Platform governance and ALM template that grows out of the current commitship implementation without overlapping with app-focused starters.

entries.name: Power Platform Code App Template
entries.summary: Dedicated repo starter for Power Platform Code App work with environment and deployment guidance.

entries.name: Power Platform PCF Template
entries.summary: Dedicated repo starter for Power Apps Component Framework controls with packaging, ALM, and testing guidance.

entries.name: Commitship ADO Governance
audience: teams with governed commit and PR flow
entries.summary: PowerShell-based commit, branch, and pull request governance toolkit for repositories that use Azure DevOps work items and PRs.
entries.notes: Current in-repo implementation that seeds the future ALM governance template work.

entries.name: Vite Site Template
entries.summary: Dedicated repo starter for content-heavy documentation, marketing, and explainer sites with publishing-focused defaults.

entries.name: Vite Web App Template
entries.summary: Dedicated repo starter for interactive Vite applications with strict TypeScript, tests, and extendable runtime guardrails.
